case_title: YUNZHI LIU VS. DJI TECHNOLOGY INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LIU, YUNZHI (ANGELA) AS TO DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-16-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2018 BY PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF YUNZHI LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TESS ZHY, EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, YUNZHI (ANGELA) AS TO DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LIU, YUNZHI (ANGELA) DJI TECHNOLOGY INC.
DECLARATION FOR CHANGE OF ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, YUNZHI (ANGELA)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, YUNZHI (ANGELA) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DJI TECHNOLOGY INC. $878.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $923.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
